title: James Sebenius on Office Hours
summary: James K. Sebenius, the Gordon Donaldson Professor of Business Administration at Harvard Business School and author (with R. Nicholas Burns and Robert H. Mnookin) of Kissinger the Negotiator, talks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about why Kissinger was an effective negotiator, the lessons we can all learn about negotiation, and Trump’s private sector negotiations.
body: James K. Sebenius , the Gordon Donaldson Professor of Business Administration at Harvard Business School and author (with R. Nicholas Burns and Robert H. Mnookin ) of Kissinger the Negotiator , talks with Aroop Mukharji (@aroopmukharji) about why Kissinger was an effective negotiator, the lessons we can all learn about negotiation, and Trump’s private sector negotiations. Sebenius Request Interview More From This Expert Overcoming Barriers to Resolving Gaza and Beyond Negotiating with Vladimir Putin: Video Advice from Five Former U.S. Secretaries of State Up Next Article Negotiating with Vladimir Putin: Video Advice from Five Former U.S. Secretaries of State Mar. 25, 2022 From Diplomacy and International Politics Photo Credit Toggle Tom Fitzsimmons Blog Post Tillerson Shares Experience, Insight as Secretary of State Fall/Winter 2019-2020 Article James Sebenius on Office Hours Podcast Sep. 4, 2018

_list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The article features an interview with James K. Sebenius, a Harvard Business School professor and co-author of 'Kissinger the Negotiator.' He discusses the key factors that made Henry Kissinger an effective negotiator, drawing lessons applicable to general negotiation practices. The conversation also extends to analyzing former President Donald Trump's negotiation style, which was honed in the private sector. The discussion aims to extract universal principles and common pitfalls in negotiation, connecting historical diplomatic strategies with contemporary business and political deal-making.
result.main_content_zh: 本文基于对哈佛商学院教授、《基辛格谈判法》合著者詹姆斯·K·塞贝尼乌斯的访谈。他深入探讨了亨利·基辛格成为高效谈判者的关键因素，并从中提炼出可供广泛借鉴的谈判经验与教训。访谈内容还延伸至对前总统唐纳德·特朗普在私营部门中磨练出的谈判风格的分析。整体对话旨在揭示谈判中的普遍原则与常见误区，将历史外交策略与当代商业及政治谈判实践联系起来，为读者提供深刻的见解。
